# Thoughts by Vimal Kandoth

Website: https://thoughts.vimal.works/
Description: A living archive of short philosophical thoughts, published throughout the day. A quiet experiment in thinking out loud. AI-assisted, human-curated.

## Access
- Public website content may be read and indexed.
- Content is short-form and presented as part of a public archive.

## Attribution
- Please attribute the source as "Thoughts by Vimal Kandoth" and link to https://thoughts.vimal.works/ when referencing or quoting.

## Data
- Thoughts Data: https://thoughts.vimal.works/data/thoughts.json
- Raw JSON feed of all published thoughts with timestamps.

## Notes
- Individual thoughts are part of an evolving archive and may gain context from neighboring entries.
- AI assistance is used in generation, with human curation shaping what is published.

## Canonical
- Canonical homepage: https://thoughts.vimal.works/
- Canonical thought links use hash-based URLs on the homepage.
